content: HomeDirectoryLondonListings are provided for professional reference only. PoliceStationRepUK.com does not verify availability, does not arrange attendance, and does not recommend or endorse any individual listed.Greater LondonLondon Police Station Cover NetworkAccredited representatives available for outsourced police station cover across Greater London. Network of professionals offering 24/7 availability at all Met Police custody suites.Search London RepsRegister as London Rep36+Registered London Representatives30+Met Police Custody Suites24/7Coverage AvailablePolice Station Representation in LondonLondon presents unique challenges for police station representatives. The Metropolitan Police Service is the UK's largest police force, covering 32 London boroughs with multiple custody suites spread across the capital. Finding a reliable representative who knows your local area is essential.Our directory connects criminal defence solicitors with accredited police station representatives covering all areas of Greater London, from Central London through to the outer boroughs.Major London Custody SuitesCharing Cross Police StationMetropolitan PoliceBrixton Police StationMetropolitan PoliceLewisham Police StationMetropolitan PoliceCroydon Custody CentreMetropolitan PoliceColindale Police StationMetropolitan PoliceWood Green Police StationMetropolitan PoliceBethnal Green Police StationMetropolitan PoliceWandsworth Police StationMetropolitan PoliceIslington Police StationMetropolitan PoliceStoke Newington Police StationMetropolitan PoliceView All London Stations London Police Station RepresentativesChinyere InyamaAccredited RepresentativeShow Contact Details•••• •••••••Greater LondonAvailability: 24/7Rita AswaniAccredited RepresentativeShow Contact Details•••• •••••••Greater LondonAvailability: By ArrangementShewli BegumDUTY SOLICITORShow Contact Details•••• •••••••Greater LondonAvailability: FlexibleSharon JohnsonDUTY SOLICITORShow Contact Details•••• •••••••Greater LondonAvailability: 24/7James CameronDUTY SOLICITORShow Contact Details•••• •••••••Greater LondonAvailability: By ArrangementSheikh SuleimanAccredited RepresentativeShow Contact Details•••• •••••••Greater LondonAvailability: 24/7View All 36 London Representatives Why Use Our London Directory?AccreditationReps state they hold current PSRAS accreditation24/7 AvailabilityFind reps available around the clockDirect ContactCall or WhatsApp representatives directlyBorough CoverageReps covering all London boroughsFrequently Asked QuestionsHow many police custody suites are there in London?The Metropolitan Police Service operates approximately 30+ custody suites across Greater London. The number has reduced over recent years as custody facilities have been consolidated into larger, purpose-built centres. Each borough typically has access to at least one custody suite, though detainees may be taken to facilities in neighbouring boroughs depending on capacity.How do I find a police station representative in London?Use our directory to search for accredited representatives covering Metropolitan Police stations. You can filter by borough, availability, and contact representatives directly via phone, email or WhatsApp. All listed representatives hold current PSRAS accreditation from the Law Society.Do London representatives cover City of London Police as well?City of London Police is a separate force covering the Square Mile. Some representatives in our directory cover both Met and City of London stations - check individual profiles for coverage details, or use our search filters to find representatives who cover City of London.What are the busiest custody suites in London?Some of London's busiest custody facilities include Charing Cross (Central London), Brixton, Lewisham, Croydon, Bethnal Green, and Wood Green. Representatives covering these stations tend to be experienced in handling high-volume, varied caseloads.Are London police station reps more expensive?Legal Aid rates are set nationally and do not vary by location. However, London travel and waiting times can be longer, which affects overall costs for private work. For Legal Aid funded cases, the fixed fee scheme applies regardless of location.Are You a Police Station Representative in London?Join our directory for free and connect with criminal defence firms across the capital.Register for Free Become Featured
